about.heading: Engineering with Product Mindset
about.description: I'm a Software Engineer focused on building robust, user-centered products. I enjoy crafting reliable backend systems and polished frontends that work together seamlessly. My goal is always to deliver software that is scalable, maintainable, and genuinely useful.

highlights.title: Engineering Depth
highlights.text: Full-stack and backend expertise with practical production-focused delivery.

highlights.title: System Thinking
highlights.text: Clean architecture, scalable design, and maintainable codebases.

highlights.title: Real Projects
highlights.text: Hands-on work across e-commerce, dashboards, and API-driven systems.

highlights.title: Continuous Growth
highlights.text: Advanced upskilling through ITI Open Source Development Diploma.

projects.heading: Featured Projects
projects.description: Real projects across full-stack apps, backend APIs, and frontend experiences. Each card includes live visuals from your project covers.

items.title: Clinic Appointment System
items.description: Full-stack, role-based healthcare platform that streamlines clinic operations from appointment booking to consultation follow-up.

items.title: Hotel System Laravel
items.description: Hotel operations system for bookings, customer records, and administration.

items.title: Affiliate Family Store
items.description: Family-focused e-commerce platform with affiliate capabilities and admin management.

items.title: Cafeteria PHP
items.description: Cafeteria management system for orders, products, and daily operations.

items.title: Watchlist
items.description: Watchlist app for tracking content with a clean UI and user-centric experience.

items.title: Quizverse
items.description: Interactive quiz project with dynamic question handling and results experience.

items.title: Bookstore Django
items.description: Bookstore backend and web system built with Django for managing products and store flows.

items.title: Task Grading Hub
items.description: Task and grading workflow platform for managing submissions and performance tracking.

items.title: Blog Prisma API
items.description: RESTful blog backend API with authentication, role-based access, posts, comments, tags, and analytics using Prisma.

items.title: Egyptian League API
items.description: A REST API for managing Egyptian league teams and players with JWT-based authentication and Prisma/PostgreSQL persistence.

certifications.heading: Certifications
certifications.description: Industry-recognized certifications that validate practical cloud and security knowledge.

items.title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
items.description: Passed the AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02) exam with a score of 881/1000, demonstrating foundational knowledge of AWS Cloud services, security, architecture, pricing, and support. AWS issues digital badges through Credly.

items.title: Information Security
items.description: Completed a 46-hour Information Security course with a final score of 93.88%, covering core cybersecurity concepts, security principles, threats, cryptography, access control, and risk management. Saylor provides course completion certificates for completed coursework.
